Test Case Description: Install plugin with valid phone number - verify OTP sent
Preconditions: User has access to WhatsApp plugin installation page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to WhatsApp plugin installation page.
2. Enter valid phone number (e.g., +201234567890).
3. Click on 'Send OTP' or 'Verify' button.
4. Verify OTP is sent.
Expected Result: OTP is successfully sent to the provided phone number and user receives notification.

Test Case Description: Enter valid OTP - verify installation success
Preconditions: User has received OTP on their phone number
Test Steps:
1. Enter the OTP received on phone.
2. Click on 'Verify' or 'Confirm' button.
3. Wait for installation process to complete.
Expected Result: Plugin installation is successful and user is redirected to dashboard or confirmation page.

Test Case Description: Enter invalid OTP - verify error message
Preconditions: User has received OTP on their phone number
Test Steps:
1. Enter incorrect OTP (wrong digits).
2. Click on 'Verify' or 'Confirm' button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid OTP and user is prompted to re-enter.

Test Case Description: Enter expired OTP - verify error message
Preconditions: User has received OTP that has expired
Test Steps:
1. Wait for OTP to expire (5–10 minutes).
2. Enter the expired OTP.
3. Click on 'Verify' or 'Confirm' button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating OTP has expired and user is prompted to request a new OTP.

Test Case Description: Invalid phone number format - verify error message
Preconditions: User is on WhatsApp plugin installation page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to WhatsApp plugin installation page.
2. Enter invalid phone number format (e.g., 12345, abc123, missing country code).
3. Click on 'Send OTP' button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid phone number format.

Test Case Description: Resend OTP functionality - verify new OTP received
Preconditions: User has requested OTP but did not receive it or it expired
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to WhatsApp plugin installation page.
2. Enter valid phone number.
3. Click on 'Resend OTP' button.
4. Verify new OTP is sent.
Expected Result: New OTP is successfully sent to the phone number and previous OTP is invalidated.

Test Case Description: Send text message to customer - verify message delivered
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and user is logged into dashboard
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to chat section.
3. Select a customer.
4. Type a text message.
5. Click Send button.
6. Verify message status.
Expected Result: Message is successfully sent and delivered to customer. Status shows as 'Delivered' or 'Sent'.

Test Case Description: Receive message from customer - verify message displayed
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and customer sends a message
Test Steps:
1. Customer sends a message via WhatsApp.
2. Login to dashboard.
3. Navigate to chat section.
4. Verify message appears.
Expected Result: Message from customer is displayed in chat with correct timestamp and sender information.

Test Case Description: Send multiple messages - verify all messages sent
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and user is in chat with customer
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to chat section.
3. Select a customer.
4. Send multiple text messages in sequence.
5. Verify all messages.
Expected Result: All messages are successfully sent and displayed in chronological order.

Test Case Description: Chat with multiple customers - verify conversation separation
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and user has multiple customer conversations
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to chat section.
3. Open conversation with Customer A and send message.
4. Open conversation with Customer B and send message.
5. Verify conversations are separate.
Expected Result: Each customer conversation is displayed separately with correct messages.

Test Case Description: Long message handling - verify truncation or scrolling
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and user is in chat
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to chat section.
3. Select a customer.
4. Type a very long message (1000+ characters).
5. Send the message.
6. Verify message display.
Expected Result: Long message is truncated with 'Read more' or displayed with scrolling capability.

Test Case Description: Share product from dashboard - verify product details sent
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and products are available
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to products section.
3. Select a product.
4. Click 'Share via WhatsApp'.
5. Select customer.
6. Send the product.
Expected Result: Product details (name, price, image, link) are successfully sent via WhatsApp.

Test Case Description: Share multiple products - verify all products shared
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and user has multiple products
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to products section.
3. Select multiple products.
4. Click 'Share via WhatsApp'.
5. Select customer.
6. Send products.
Expected Result: All selected products are successfully shared and displayed in chat.

Test Case Description: Share product with customer - verify customer receives details
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and user shares a product
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Select product.
3. Choose customer.
4. Share via WhatsApp.
5. Verify on customer's WhatsApp.
Expected Result: Customer receives product link and details (name, price, image).

Test Case Description: Share non-existent product - verify error handling
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Attempt to share deleted/non-existent product.
3. Click 'Share via WhatsApp'.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating product not found or cannot be shared.

Test Case Description: Send image to customer - verify image delivered
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and user has image file
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to chat section.
3. Select customer.
4. Click 'Attach/Image'.
5. Select image file.
6. Send image.
Expected Result: Image is successfully sent and displayed in chat.

Test Case Description: Send multiple images - verify all images sent
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and user has multiple image files
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to chat section.
3. Select customer.
4. Click 'Attach/Image'.
5. Select multiple images.
6. Send images.
Expected Result: All images are successfully sent and displayed in correct order.

Test Case Description: Send large image file - verify handling/compression
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed and user has large image file
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to chat section.
3. Select customer.
4. Click 'Attach/Image'.
5. Select large image file (>5MB).
6. Send image.
Expected Result: Image is compressed automatically or error displayed if file is too large.

Test Case Description: Send unsupported image format - verify error message
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to chat section.
3. Select customer.
4. Click 'Attach/Image'.
5. Select unsupported format (.bmp, .tiff, .raw).
6. Attempt to send.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating unsupported file format.

Test Case Description: Send image with text - verify both delivered
Preconditions: WhatsApp plugin is installed
Test Steps:
1. Login to dashboard.
2. Navigate to chat section.
3. Select customer.
4. Click 'Attach/Image'.
5. Select image.
6. Add text caption.
7. Send.
Expected Result: Both image and caption are successfully sent and displayed in chat.
